description:
This quiz assesses core SQL query skills, testing the ability to write and understand fundamental SELECT, JOIN, and filtering statements without relying on ORM abstractions. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a supportive, encouraging tone that nudges developers to refresh their raw SQL knowledge. The format is concise and practical, prompting quick hands‑on validation of query competence.
Topics: SQL SELECT statements, JOIN operations, WHERE clauses and filtering, Basic query optimization, Understanding relational data without ORM
Audience: Developers who regularly use ORMs but need to strengthen their foundational SQL skills, as well as intermediate-level programmers preparing for technical interviews or data‑focused roles.
